name: The Lavender Madras Shawl
description: A beautifully soft Indian cotton muslin baby shawl in a rich, medium lavender-lilac color. It features a classic, traditional Madras woven plaid pattern accented with cream, deep purple, and soft grey. Handcrafted with our signature breathable weave, this shawl provides perfect temperature regulation for your little one.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold with similar colors. Tumble dry low.

name: The Pure White Bindi Nursing Cover
description: An elegant, completely opaque pure white cotton nursing cover designed for absolute privacy and comfort. Adorned with a delicate, traditional Indian bindi dot block-print pattern in bright red. The breathable yet thick muslin weave ensures your baby stays cool while providing full coverage for confident nursing anywhere.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold with similar colors. Tumble dry low.

name: The Agra Brick Rose Swaddle
description: Inspired by the warm, sunlit clay walls of Agra heritage quarters. A rich brick red cotton muslin swaddle adorned with a simple, elegant gold rosebud block-print pattern. Each piece is handcrafted using traditional Indian block-printing techniques passed down through generations. Perfectly sized for swaddling, nursing, or as a stroller cover.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold with similar colors. Tumble dry low.

name: The Heritage Paisley Swaddle
description: Our signature 100% cotton muslin swaddle featuring a hand-block inspired paisley print in Rich Madder Red and Saffron Teal. Breathable, pre-washed for extra softness, and large enough to grow with your baby.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold with like colors. Tumble dry low. Do not bleach.

name: The Sunrise Heritage Swaddle
description: A radiant take on traditional luxury. This 100% cotton swaddle features our signature paisley motif set against a vibrant 'Sunrise Orange' palette, accented with Golden Turmeric and Madder Red. The fabric is framed by a clean, unbleached cotton border for a modern, balanced aesthetic. Designed for maximum breathability and superior softness to soothe your baby in style.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold. Tumble dry low. Fabric softens with every wash.

name: The Simplicity Heritage Shawl
description: Inspired by the simple, powerful elegance of traditional styles. A plain, unbleached cream cotton swaddle with a deeply saturated traditional blue border. Focusing on the quality of natural cotton fibers and minimal, ancestral design.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash warm with like colors. Tumble dry low. Do not bleach.

name: The 'Ancients' Raw Brown Swaddle
description: The most primitive and authentic expression of newborn care. This 100% raw brown cotton swaddle is unbleached and entirely plain, focusing on the inherent beauty and breathability of natural fibers. It offers a deeply textural, ancestral connection for your baby, free from modern dyes or complex prints. Designed specifically for secure, traditional swaddling with a subtle self-fringe finish.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold. Line dry for best texture. Natural color variation is a hallmark of this raw fiber.

name: The Midnight Monsoon Swaddle
description: A sophisticated, darker option perfect for evening and night routines. Inspired by the Indian monsoon rains. Deep indigo blue color driven by natural indigo dyes, paired with very delicate, subtle silver/white block-printed motifs that resemble intricate raindrops or night stars.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold with like colors to preserve the natural indigo dye. Tumble dry low or line dry.

name: The Golden Lotus Shawl
description: A bright, uplifting swaddle meant to symbolize purity, enlightenment, and warmth. Highly photogenic for 'first weeks' photo shoots. A soft, warm saffron/turmeric golden yellow. It features elegant, intricate white lotus flower block-print patterns.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash warm with like colors. Tumble dry low. Do not bleach.

name: The Emerald Forest Winter Quilt (Reversible)
description: As we approach cooler months, parents look for something slightly thicker than standard muslin, but maintaining the breathable multi-layer weave. Reversible 4-layer quilt. One side is a rich, deep emerald/forest green, and the reverse side is a gentle celadon or sage green. Quilted with subtle geometric lattice stitching.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold. Tumble dry low. The 4-layer quilt fluffs beautifully after washing.

name: The Marigold Bloom Summer Swaddle
description: A lightweight summer option featuring bright marigold flowers to represent joy and festivity in Indian culture. An airy cream base with vibrant orange and gold floral block prints, accented with soft sage green leaves. Made of ultra-sheer, single-layer 100% organic cotton muslin for hot summer days.

analytics.material: Ultra-light Single Layer Organic Cotton Muslin

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold on gentle cycle. Line dry recommended due to sheer organic weave.

name: The Desert Sand Heritage Swaddle
description: A minimalist, highly versatile swaddle inspired by the warm, sun-baked earth of the Thar desert. A soft, warm terracotta/sand background with rich, muted rust and charcoal black traditional tribal geometric block prints. Designed to look beautiful both neatly folded and wrapped around your peacefully sleeping little one.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold with similar colors. Tumble dry low.

name: The Jaipur Pink Peony Swaddle
description: Inspired by the architectural warmth of the Pink City. A soft blush pink base with vibrant magenta, rich rose, and gold traditional block-printed peony florals. Designed to swaddle your baby in elegant, joyful luxury.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold with similar colors. Tumble dry low.

name: The Kerala Monsoon Bamboo Swaddle
description: Inspired by the lush tropical landscapes of southern India during the monsoon season. A pale bamboo green base comes alive with deep forest green and light matcha tropical leaf block prints. Woven from an ultra-soft, thermo-regulating premium bamboo-cotton blend.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold on gentle cycle. Line dry or tumble dry on lowest heat.

name: The Royal Peacock Plum Swaddle
description: Inspired by the national bird of India. A soft pearlescent cream base adorned with deep regal plum, soft lavender, and rich turquoise block prints of peacock feathers. Features the official SwaddleShawls woven tag.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold with similar colors. Tumble dry low.

name: The Goa Sandalwood Sunset Swaddle
description: Inspired by golden hour on the coasts of Goa. A warm, soft sandalwood brown base comes alive with traditional terracotta and sunburst yellow botanical block prints. Features the official SwaddleShawls woven tag.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold with similar colors. Tumble dry low.

name: The Kashmir Valley Rose Swaddle
description: Inspired by the cool, misty dawn of the Kashmir valleys. A soft misty grey base with intricate, sprawling vintage rose and vine block prints in deep burgundy and muted silver. Features the official SwaddleShawls woven tag.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold with similar colors. Tumble dry low.

name: The Himalayan Frost Heritage Swaddle
description: Inspired by the cool, crisp air of the Himalayan mountains. A soft, icy blueish-white base adorned with deep navy blue and bright white block-printed geometric snowflake and star motifs. Features the official SwaddleShawls woven tag.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold with similar colors. Tumble dry low.

name: The Varanasi Sunset Silk-Blend Swaddle
description: Inspired by the spiritual, vibrant sunsets over the Ganges in Varanasi. A soft, radiant sunset apricot base with rich vermilion red, soft gold, and deep charcoal gray traditional Indian damask block prints. Woven from a premium 70% Cotton / 30% Silk blend muslin for an exceptionally luxurious sheen and softness.

analytics.pattern: Traditional Damask and Mandala Block Print

attributes.care_instructions: Hand wash cold or gentle machine cycle in a delicates bag. Line dry.

name: The Royal Jaipur Loungewear Set
description: A lightweight, breathable, two-piece nursing-friendly button-down loungewear pajama set for mothers. A soft blush pink base with delicate, intricate traditional Indian block-printed vines in magenta and gold. Features the official SwaddleShawls woven tag.

analytics.size: Available in S, M, L, XL

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold with similar colors. Tumble dry on low heat.

name: The Golden Lotus Maternity Robe
description: A luxurious, lightweight maternity robe tailored for hospital stays, lounging, or nursing. Features a radiant saffron yellow base adorned with vibrant ruby and soft gold traditional Indian lotus floral block prints. Finished with wide, comfortable sleeves and our official SwaddleShawls tag.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold. Tumble dry on lowest setting or line dry in shade.

name: The Heritage Block-Print Nursing Cover
description: Our premier essential for adulthood/parenthood. A lightweight, breathable nursing cover for mothers, designed to double gracefully as a stylish scarf or shawl. A deep, rich indigo dyed base featuring traditional white and silver 'Ajrakh' geometric and floral block prints.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold to preserve the indigo dye. Tumble dry on lowest setting or line dry in shade.
